title: Complete a waste scan and earn credits
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can finish the two-step AI waste scanner flow and receive a successful credit reward.
category: AI Waste Scanner step 1 + step 2 verification flow

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify a successful scan confirmation is visible

title: Create an account and access personalized features
description: This verifies that a new visitor can create an account and is automatically logged in with access to authenticated content.

steps.description: Fill in full name with a new user name
Verify personalized account state is displayed

title: Claim a reward and review redemption history
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can redeem a reward, copy the redeem code, and confirm the claim appears in history.
category: authenticated rewards redemption / profile update via /api/data/me

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify a redemption confirmation is visible
Verify the claim history includes the new reward claim

title: Sign up and reach the home experience
description: This verifies that a new user can create an account from the homepage and end up logged in on the main experience.
category: Homepage navigation and core account state

steps.description: Click the sign up entry point
Fill in a new email address into the email field
Fill in a new password into the password field
Verify the authenticated home experience is displayed

title: Log in with valid credentials and reach account state
description: This verifies that a returning user can log in and see authenticated personalized access.

steps.description: Verify personalized account state is displayed

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field

description: This verifies that an authenticated user can finish the second scanner step and receive a final verification outcome with credits awarded.

Select or upload a smart bin image

Verify final credits awarded are displayed

Verify a redeem code is displayed

title: Update profile details successfully

Update editable profile details with valid values

title: View dashboard analytics

Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field

Create a new community post with a message

title: Publish a community update with a photo link
description: A community user can submit a post with a name, post type, message, and optional photo URL and see it appear in the feed.

Fill in the message field with a community update
Fill in the photo URL field with a valid image link

Verify the submitted photo is associated with the new post

title: See scan progress mismatch guidance
description: This verifies that an authenticated user receives clear feedback when the verification step does not match the initial scan result.
category: AI Waste Scanner step 1 + step 2 verification flow

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Complete the verification step with a different valid item type
Verify a scan verification warning is visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that a visitor entering incorrect credentials sees an invalid credentials message and cannot access authenticated content.

steps.description: Fill in email address with an invalid email
Fill in password with an incorrect password
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible
Verify authenticated access is not visible

title: Reject an empty community message
description: A community user sees validation when trying to post without the required message content.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a unique display name
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the post is not added to the feed

title: Reject an invalid community photo link
description: This verifies that a community contributor entering an invalid photo URL sees validation feedback and does not publish the post.

steps.description: Fill in the community message with a new update
Fill in the optional photo URL with an invalid URL
Verify a photo URL validation error is visible
Verify the new community post is not displayed

title: Reject a too-short contact message
description: A visitor sees validation when the contact message does not meet the minimum length requirement.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a visitor name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a short message
Verify a validation error is visible

title: See validation when community content is incomplete
description: This verifies that an authenticated community user is prevented from posting when the required content is missing or invalid.

Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Attempt to submit an empty or invalid community post
Verify a post validation error is visible
